MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-16-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WEDNESDAY, AUG-16-06: MARC SEIDENFELD, ESQ. APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF PATRICIA HESTER; THOMAS V. LORAN, III, ESQ. AND SHANNON WAGGONER, ESQ. APPEAR FOR DEFENDANT DOROTHY SMITH, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; THE CASE SETTLES; PARTIES ENTER INTO AN AGREEMENT; TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT ARE PLACED ON THE RECORD AND INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING:
BY THE PLAINTIFF:
NO FURTHER RENT IS OWED BY DEFENDANT WITH REGARD TO PREMISES LOCATED AT 1667 NEWCOMB AVENUE, SAN FRANICSCO, CA 94124; SECURITY DEPOSIT RETURNED BY PLAINTIFF; ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT IS DEEMED ABANDONED; RENTAL AGREEMENT IS FORFEITED; FULL RELEASES DOCUMENTED BY DEFENSE COUNSEL RE SECT. 1540 CIVIL CODE;
BY THE DEFENDANT: PLAINTIFF WILL PROVIDE 24 HOURS ADVANCE NOTICE TO COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT RE IMMEDIATE ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION REDUCED TO WRITING AND FILING WITH THE COURT; ON THE RECORD, PLAINTIFF HESTER AGREES TO THE SETTLEMENT.

D-206 TRIAL DATE IS REMOVED.

JUDGE PRO TEM JOSEPH CARIGNAN; REPORTER: DIANA PADILLA, CSR; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-218/206).
